source: Library of Congress, Geography & Map Division
license: Public domain (LoC online Sanborn Maps collection is explicitly in the public domain)
title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Haines, Haines Census Division, Alaska (sheet 1)
description: Sheet 1 of the October 1914 Sanborn fire insurance map of Haines, Alaska. Shows the Alaska Pacific Fisheries cannery, the lumber company and planning mill on the waterfront, Main Street, Union Street, and Dalton Avenue. A primary source for the early layout of Haines before the town's 1924 reincorporation after purchase of Fort Chilkoot.
alt: 1914 Sanborn fire insurance map of Haines, Alaska (sheet 1), showing the waterfront cannery and early town grid
